summary: Frontend-only Home verification passed on http://127.0.0.1:3456 for latest studio-premium web restructure. Manifesto section is visible in the updated flow, compare promo opens compare mode correctly, compare cards clearly present package/location/starting-price/highlights together, featured floral image renders correctly on desktop web, and Home vendor navigation has no regression on desktop/mobile.
action_items: No blocking issue found in this scoped Home-only run.
Optional: keep periodic visual checks at 1366px/1440px to preserve premium hierarchy after future content edits.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical implementation issue found in reviewed Home files for this scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on static web preview for Home-only scope: manifesto placement, compare promo-to-compare flow, compare card detail completeness, featured image rendering, and navigation regression checks. n8n availability webhook and booking submission webhook are MOCKED and were not validated.
rca_of_issue: No reproducible issue found in this scoped run. Initial compare-label check false-negative was caused by case-sensitive assertion in test script; case-insensitive re-check passed.
